article.title: Interview Help
article.content:
I have completed SDE sheet but when I try to solve new questions I am not able to do so, I might be doing something wrong anyone could guide me? I have been preparing for SDE 1 positions, have around 10 months experience. 
I am targetting high paying product companies or startups with around 16LPA+(fixed).
What exactly should I do?

post.content: Hey, don\u2019t be too hard on yourself buddy! You\u2019re actually doing really well \u2014 the fact that you\u2019ve completed the SDE sheet shows your dedication and hard work. It\u2019s completely normal to feel stuck when facing new problems. What matters most is consistency.\nWhen you get stuck, don\u2019t hesitate to look at the solution. Focus on really understanding the intuition and the "why" behind it. After that, try solving it on your own again \u2014 that\u2019s how you build real strength man.\nJust keep showing up and trust the process. You\u2019re already on the right path, and with steady practice, you\u2019ll definitely get there buddy. Best of Luck...
can we connect even im also preparing
